question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 12, 2:45AM-3:00AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 13, 3AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 13, 3AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Map Handicap: BRUTE (-1.5)
description:
In the upcoming match between Brute and Washington in the European Pro League Series 4 Play-In Group C, scheduled for January 11 at 4:00AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Brute" if Brute wins 2 or more maps than Washington in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Washington".

If the match is postponed, this market will remain open until the match has been completed.

If the match is canceled entirely, with no make-up match, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Brute vs Washington (BO3)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Brute" if Brute win against Washington in the named Counter-Strike match in the European Pro League Series 4 Play-In Group C, scheduled for January 11 at 4:00AM ET.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 11 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Niagara Purple Eagles and Manhattan Jaspers combine to score 143 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 143, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 13, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 7°C or below on January 13?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 13 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 13 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 13, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: ASB Classic: Adrian Mannarino vs Eliot Spizzirri
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Adrian Mannarino and Eliot Spizzirri in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 11 at 5:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Mannarino' if Adrian Mannarino advances against Eliot Spizzirri.

This market will resolve to 'Spizzirri' if Eliot Spizzirri advances against Adrian Mannarino.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Spread: CA Rosario Central (-1.5)
description:

question: Ostapenko vs. Valentova: Match O/U 21.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jelena Ostapenko and Tereza Valentova in the Adelaide International, scheduled for January 12 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.
groupItemTitle: Adelaide International: Jelena Ostapenko vs Tereza Valentova Match O/U 21.5

events.title: Adelaide International: Jelena Ostapenko vs Tereza Valentova
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Jelena Ostapenko and Tereza Valentova in the Adelaide International, scheduled for January 12 at 6:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Ostapenko' if Jelena Ostapenko advances against Tereza Valentova.

This market will resolve to 'Valentova' if Tereza Valentova advances against Jelena Ostapenko.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Jelena Ostapenko and Tereza Valentova in the Adelaide International, scheduled for January 12 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 23. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.

events.title: Adelaide International: Jelena Ostapenko vs Tereza Valentova
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Jelena Ostapenko and Tereza Valentova in the Adelaide International, scheduled for January 12 at 6:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Ostapenko' if Jelena Ostapenko advances against Tereza Valentova.

This market will resolve to 'Valentova' if Tereza Valentova advances against Jelena Ostapenko.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Queens Park Rangers FC vs. Wrexham AFC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Queens Park Rangers FC and Wrexham AFC, scheduled for January 24 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Queens Park Rangers FC and Wrexham AFC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

description:

This market refers to the tennis match between Katie Volynets and Ann Li in the Hobart International, scheduled for January 12 2026.

question: Middlesbrough FC vs. Preston North End FC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Middlesbrough FC and Preston North End FC, scheduled for January 24 at 7:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Middlesbrough FC and Preston North End FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.
